notes.sg-global-warming: Global warming is a cause of changes studied in hydrology, not a subfield of hydrology itself.
notes.sg-geotechnical-engineering: Geotechnical engineering is a separate discipline, though it may use hydrological principles.
notes.sg-earth-system: Earth system science is a broader field that includes hydrology, but is not a subfield of it.
notes.sg-soil-science: Soil science is a related but distinct field from hydrology.
notes.sg-global-change: Global change is a broader concept that impacts hydrology, but is not a subfield of hydrology.
